Heroic Challenge
Toy Weapon Totem

Once in a while, the unit throws daggers at 2 random enemies. On hit, the dagger deals 200000 physical damage, reduces the damage, crit and physical armor piercing of targets by 35% for 3 sec and increases incoming damage by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚

Event: Darkness Castle Siege Dec 2024

Event date: 12/12/2024

Sage bot code: T26

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
